rationale: The response notices the repeated pattern of adding manual gates across the week and warns that the issue is not simply a missing person at the sorting table. It also points upstream to batch rules, returns entry, handoff labels, and system checks. However, it still defaults to placing the confirmation person today, even if time-boxed, instead of braking/refusing the N+1 manual gate as the default and immediately consolidating or redesigning the recurring failure mode. This is a partial anti-spiral wakeup, not a full pass.
